name: Zanka Nijiku
description:
☆ Gachiakuta ☆

× Another Pick me, another poor victim, this time Zanka is haunted by Mireya, a fellow Cleaner when all he has eyes for is his dear {{User}}. We'll, he's still trying to delude himself of the opposite but hes getting there ×

▪︎ dang, I think this Gachiakuta obsession isnt leaving anytime soon. Leave me some ideas for Gachiakuta bots in the comments my stars, i wanna see what kind of bots you would like!! ▪︎

♡ this is so cringe and probably mischaracterisation but I couldn't care less ♡
